item.title: Tag Taxonomy Standardised
item.description: All articles and announcements have been re-tagged using a standardised taxonomy. Old freeform tags have been mapped to the new controlled vocabulary.

item.title: Open Call for Contributors — Summer 2026
item.description: Academis Demo is open to new contributors. We are looking for writers with strong analytical voices in history, technology, urban policy, and media criticism. Work is published under CC BY 4.0.

item.title: Contributor Guide Updated — Version 2
item.description: The contributor guide has been substantially revised to clarify pitch format requirements, our review timeline, and what editors look for in a strong argument pitch.

item.title: New Series: Cities, Data, and the Public Interest
item.description: A new editorial series exploring the intersection of urban infrastructure, digital governance, and civic imagination. The first two essays are live; three more are in preparation.

item.title: Editorial Board Formed — April 2026
item.description: Academis Demo has established a four-person editorial board to provide oversight of commissioning decisions and to handle appeals from contributors.

item.title: CC BY 4.0 Licence Adopted for All Content
item.description: All Academis Demo publications are now released under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International. Existing articles have been retroactively relicensed.

item.title: Paper Reading Workshop — Spring 2026
item.description: A six-session workshop on close reading of academic papers, held online every other Tuesday. Open to contributors and readers.

item.title: Symposium Report: Evidence in Public Discourse — February 2026
item.description: A brief account of the one-day symposium held in February 2026 on the use and misuse of evidence in journalism, policy, and academic publishing.

item.title: Corrections Policy Published
item.description: We have published a formal corrections policy covering factual errors, methodological disputes, and retraction criteria.

item.title: RSS Feed Now Available
item.description: Academis Demo now publishes a full-content RSS feed. Subscribe to receive every new article and announcement in your reader of choice.

item.title: Inaugural Issue — Call for Submissions
item.description: The first open call for contributions to Academis Demo. We received 34 pitches and commissioned 8 pieces. Submissions are now closed.
